content.fact_text: Implementation of production-grade authentication and MFA enforcement middleware using JWT and Redis.

provenance_data.behaviour: Intercepts incoming HTTP requests, validates JWT structure/signature/expiry, performs Redis-based session validation, enforces MFA status via Redis keys, and checks RBAC roles. Attaches user context to Request object.
interfaces: createAuthMiddleware(redis: Redis, logger: Logger): (options?: AuthMiddlewareOptions) => (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => Promise<void>
provenance_data.utility: Provides high-performance, secure authentication and RBAC/MFA enforcement middleware integrated with existing Redis session and token management infrastructures.
